{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Hammer Icon
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Hammer Icon]] is manifested by [[Soulsmiths]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] can sense the song of the [[Hammer Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Hammer Icon]] is an icon that resonated with the sight of the soul-filled geode fragment.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Lindon]] tapped into the [[Hammer Icon]] and the [[Void Icon]] together.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
